Refines F-f81bd0c136c6: the R_WORKER 1.11 excess = sub-eps decode-kernel gap + intrinsic gz ring overhead, NOT one clean decode-kernel excess.
method: fulcrum excess over symmetric table+decode vs ring sub-partition (gz region_prof sub-spans: read_header+ensure_dist_* nested-clawed -> R_TABLE; Block::read+decode_clean_into_contig -> R_DECODE; residual ring. rg patch: readHeader -> R_TABLE; inner block loop + ISA-L readStream(decodeChunkWithInexactOffset/finishDecodeChunkWithInexactOffset) -> R_DECODE). Gate-0: SUB_OVERLAP=0 both arms, non-inert, conservation exact, sha==zcat all 18 reps, /dev/null both, A/A 0.71pct. Gate-1 N=9 interleaved. Gate-4 path=ParallelSM HEAD 39acc213. claim: ring_other per-chunk worker scaffold (ChunkData setup + per-block loop in finish_decode_chunk_contig_native + finalize + ~1% ContigFoldSink fold-drain copy) is ON the critical path (NOT off-critical slack): frozen Zen2 slow-knob criticality 0.82 silesia-T4 / 1.53 monorepo-T2, sleep-control reproduces (0.80/0.93) so not a turbo artifact, dwall(30%)=32ms > 2xspread. CAVEATS gating the fold-drain->append convergence: (1) tests the whole residual not the copy; literal fold-drain copy is ~1% (bulk clean path already does rg-style direct-append via decode_clean_into_contig, no ring/drain); (2) speed-up CEILING UNBOUNDED: the only copy-removal oracle GZIPPY_FOLD_NODRAIN is INVALID at T>1 (uninitialized window bytes -> successor speculative chunks consume corrupt windows -> 2.7x re-decode cascade; clean at T1 0.387 vs 0.384s). fold-drain->append convergence NOT justified yet: sub-localize ring_other + build a window-safe copy-removal oracle first.
method: GZIPPY_RING_INJECT_NS per-chunk rdtsc-spin slow-knob in chunk_fetcher worker wrapper (inside R_WORKER, outside R_TABLE/R_DECODE -> lands in ring_other); GZIPPY_SLOW_KIND=sleep freq-neutral control; N=9 interleaved /dev/null both arms; fulcrum perturb; cursor-agent reviewed design; FOLD_NODRAIN oracle dropped as T>1-invalid
